elements.name: tj-loader
elements.description: Shows a loading overlay until the page content is ready.

attributes.name: data-src
attributes.description: Optional image source used inside the default loader UI.

attributes.name: observe-scroll-element
attributes.description: CSS selector for the element whose scroll position should be restored after loading.

classes.name: stay-open
classes.description: Keeps the loader visible even after it reaches the ready state.
